verses.text: Moses records the journeys by God's command. The record. The pilgrimage is written down.
Moses records the journeys by God's command. The record. The pilgrimage is written down.
They went out of Egypt the day after the passover. The start. Redemption began the journey.
They went out of Egypt the day after the passover. The start. Redemption began the journey.
Station by station their forty-year journey is named. The way. God led them every step from Egypt to Jordan.

God bids them drive out the Canaanites and destroy their idols. Drive out. The land must be cleansed.

If they fail, the nations will be thorns to them. Warning. Compromise will wound them.
